api_key.description: Simplesat API token, sent as the X-Simplesat-Token header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Simplesat API base URL override for tests or proxies.

page_size.description: Number of records requested per page (page_size query param), 1-1000.

start_date.description: Optional start_date query filter passed through verbatim.

end_date.description: Optional end_date query filter passed through verbatim.
